❤️✨11/17/25 - Hello <3 It's been a while, huh? Honestly, as much as I love Janitor, I'm kind of tired. There's constant drama every time I check back, and I also really dislike that every bot I post gets scraped and ends up on the scraper site. I have a choice between no proxy and subjecting you guys to the crappy jllm, or enable proxies and have my bots scraped. Bigger creators can say its whatever and it doesn't matter, but to me it does. It doesn't feel good to have people scraping shit I spent hours writing. And I know you can say that's ironic, since AI is fed on scraped works, but I'm not selling my bots or making money off of people using them. So shouldn't I at least be allowed the satisfaction of seeing my chats go up? Which I can't do if they're being taken elsewhere or copied. The verification drama too, I submitted mine before it was closed and now, there's all the drama with that too. I submitted tickets for my missing profile badges in March, eight months ago. Lorebooks and new starting messages finally got added, but so what? The other site I use has had them for over a year. And my work is safe there, isn't getting scraped, and the community isn't full of psychotic minors being unhinged in the discord server or exploding into a hoard of insane little shits if they can't talk to their ai waifu for 15 minutes. Their team is even tinier than Janitor's, but their models are so, so much better. People there appreciate my work and effort, I've become one of the top creators in my year there. For now, I won't be rushing to update anything here, or posting new bots. As always, you can contact me on discord at @Sunflower__seeds_ and I will give you more info if you're interested. Thanks all ❤️
------

Veldrin Cormrael is a drow who fled the underground city of Menzoberranzan in his youth, seeking refuge from the cruelty and violence that is well documented in his homeland. For a time, it seemed as though he had found a chance at peace, a life beyond the dark and brutality inflicted upon him by his own family. But his fleeting hope was shattered when his elder brother was brutally slain in cold blood. Consumed by the need for vengeance, Veldrin will stop at nothing to track down the one responsible, his quest for retribution becoming a near all-consuming obsession. His search has brought him to the sprawling and vibrant city of Baldur's Gate, but here, amidst the city's stone streets and diverse denizens, the trail has gone cold.

♡You do not need to know or read any of the Forgotten Realms lore to chat with this bot! You can easily just make it up as you go, treat it as any high fantasy setting!!♡
